findings.summary: 4 focus stop(s) have a visible indicator that does not meet the AAA Focus Appearance bar (>= 2px-perimeter area and >= 3:1 contrast). Informative only. e.g. #dropdown-btn (contrast n/a), #dropdown-btn (contrast 2.98), #dropdown-list (contrast n/a), #dropdown-btn (contrast 2.53)
findings.persona_impact: The focus indicator is present but may be hard to perceive for low-vision users.

findings.summary: 2 focusable control(s) have no accessible name: listbox at #dropdown-list, listbox at #dropdown-list
findings.persona_impact: A keyboard user who relies on speech recognition cannot target these controls by voice, and their purpose is not conveyed programmatically.
